features.name: force_release_with_mixed_assignment_types
features.description: Code should include force and release statements on signals that also have both assign (continuous) and always_comb (procedural) assignments

features.name: adjacent_force_release_signals
features.description: Code should include two adjacent signal declarations with force/release applied where declaration order affects correctness

features.name: force_release_in_clock_edge_block
features.description: Code should include force and release statements inside a clock edge (negedge or posedge) procedural block
